languages.text: "Скрывать, полагаю, уже бессмысленно". {n}Ювенна явно раздражена вашим бесцеремонным вторжением.{/n} "Да, это так".
"No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."
languages.original_text: "Скрывать, полагаю, уже бессмысленно". {n}Ювенна явно раздражена вашим бесцеремонным вторжением.{/n} "Да, это так".

traits.locale_text: "No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."
"No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."
"No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."

languages.text: «Supongo que ya no tiene sentido ocultarlo». {n}Juvenna está molesta a todas luces por tu brusca intrusión.{/n} «Sí, soy yo».
languages.original_text: "No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."

traits.locale_text: «Supongo que ya no tiene sentido ocultarlo». {n}Juvenna está molesta a todas luces por tu brusca intrusión.{/n} «Sí, soy yo».

languages.text: “事到如今，也没必要藏着掖着了。”{n}尤文娜显然对你这突如其来的闯入颇为恼火。{/n}“没错，我就是。”
languages.original_text: "No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."

traits.locale_text: “事到如今，也没必要藏着掖着了。”{n}尤文娜显然对你这突如其来的闯入颇为恼火。{/n}“没错，我就是。”

languages.text: « Inutile de continuer à jouer la comédie, je présume. » {n}Juvenna est visiblement contrariée par votre irruption intempestive.{/n} « Oui, c'est bien moi. »
languages.original_text: "No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."

traits.locale_text: « Inutile de continuer à jouer la comédie, je présume. » {n}Juvenna est visiblement contrariée par votre irruption intempestive.{/n} « Oui, c'est bien moi. »

languages.text: "Sanırım artık saklamanın bir anlamı yok." {n}Juvenna, teklifsizce araya girmenden açıkça rahatsız oluyor.{/n} "Evet, benim."
languages.original_text: "No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."

traits.locale_text: "Sanırım artık saklamanın bir anlamı yok." {n}Juvenna, teklifsizce araya girmenden açıkça rahatsız oluyor.{/n} "Evet, benim."

languages.text: "Ich nehme an, es hat keinen Sinn mehr, es zu verbergen." {n}Juvenna ist angesichts deiner ungenierten Störung sichtlich verärgert.{/n} "Ja, die bin ich."
languages.original_text: "No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."

traits.locale_text: "Ich nehme an, es hat keinen Sinn mehr, es zu verbergen." {n}Juvenna ist angesichts deiner ungenierten Störung sichtlich verärgert.{/n} "Ja, die bin ich."

languages.text: 「もう隠す意味はないわね。」{n}ジュベナはあなたの乱暴な侵入に明らかに腹を立てている.{/n} 「そう、私はそう思う。」
languages.original_text: "No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."
